case_title: KISSI KENYA CARPENTER VS. SHAHDEEP SINGH

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPENTER, KISSI KENYA (GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR BAYE TWICE AMARIAH GARDNER, MINOR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGH, SHAHDEEP $525.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2019 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. SHAHDEEP SINGH DOES NOT OWE KISSI KENYA CARPENTER (GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR BAYE TWICE AMARIAH GARDNER, MINOR) ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAR-26-2019. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARPENTER, KISSI KENYA (GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR BAYE TWICE AMARIAH GARDNER, MINOR) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 20, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF KISSI KENYA CARPENTER AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR BAYE TWICE AMARIAH, DEFENDNAT IS ALSO PRESENT IN OPEN COURT. PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shahdeep Singh, Appellant/Defendant appearing in propria persona; No other appearances.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. The matter is called at 9:33 am. Appellant is affirmed.

Shahdeep Singh testifies on his own behalf. At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes the matter under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Judgment Entered
